status: Stage 1 beta complete - Stage 2 reporting now starting
currentFocus: Stage 1 beta is complete. Referral files can be dropped into the intake dashboard, extracted into patient fields, checked against Cliniko, and uploaded into Cliniko through the controlled admin workflow. The project is now moving into Stage 2: Victoria's NHS reporting, appointment history, DNA, discharge and monthly activity workspace.

recentUpdates.title: Stage 1 beta complete
recentUpdates.body: The intake workflow has now been tested end to end with dummy referral data. Files are being dropped into the dashboard, patient details are being extracted, Cliniko duplicate checks are running, and the controlled Cliniko upload route has successfully created a test patient.

recentUpdates.title: Moving into Stage 2
recentUpdates.body: The build focus now moves to Victoria's reporting workspace: appointment history, attended/DNA/cancelled activity, discharge fields, monthly reporting outputs and the data Victoria needs to reduce the manual reporting workload.

recentUpdates.title: Prototype simplified for staff testing
recentUpdates.body: The dashboard has been redesigned into a cleaner two-panel workspace so staff can select a referral, review the patient details, open source files inside the portal, add notes, and continue the workflow without leaving the page.

recentUpdates.title: Source files now open in the portal
recentUpdates.body: Referral PDFs, RTFs and uploaded files are now designed to open in an in-portal preview window, reducing the need for reception to download files just to read what was sent.

recentUpdates.title: Cliniko duplicate checks now run automatically
recentUpdates.body: After referral upload and extraction, the system rebuilds the intake queue and checks Cliniko for possible duplicate patients using available identifiers such as name, DOB, email, phone, NHS number, postcode and address.

recentUpdates.title: Stage 2 reporting direction mapped
recentUpdates.body: The next layer will reuse the Cliniko patient link and NHS case record to show appointment history, attended/DNA/cancelled status, follow-ups, discharge triggers and monthly reporting fields for Victoria.

recentUpdates.title: Client progress portal created
recentUpdates.body: A simple progress website has been created so Victoria can see what has been built, what is being tested, and what is coming next.

stages.name: Stage 1A
stages.label: Referral intake and admin workspace
stages.summary: Create a controlled workspace where staff can upload referral files, view the source document, review extracted demographics, and keep the patient in the dashboard until the details are checked.
complete: Compact referral upload flow
Referral queue with active, urgent, Cliniko match, completed and all-referral views
Clickable in-portal source-file preview
Editable patient contact/demographic fields
Action notes and mark-as-complete workflow
Safe anonymised public demo for Victoria feedback
Dummy referral files tested through the intake workflow
next: Collect Victoria's feedback on any wording or workflow friction
Keep OCR/handwritten referral handling flagged for staff review until the OCR route is fully approved

stages.name: Stage 1B
stages.label: Cliniko duplicate checks and controlled sync
stages.summary: Before any patient is created, the system checks Cliniko for possible existing records and blocks unsafe duplicate creation. The first real test should be done with a clearly named dummy patient.
complete: Automatic Cliniko sweep after upload/extraction
Searches across name, DOB, email, phone, NHS number, postcode and address where available
Possible-match warning state in the dashboard
Direct link pathway for existing Cliniko records
Dry-run Cliniko creation mode available for safety
Controlled live dummy patient creation completed successfully
next: Decide whether Stage 1 remains manual approval-only during early use
Agree who is allowed to click the live Cliniko import button
Confirm the clean-up process for dummy/test Cliniko patients after validation

stages.name: Stage 1C
stages.label: Med Tech contact and patient communication support
stages.summary: Create or open the patient contact in Med Tech so reception can phone, email or message the patient using a clean contact workflow and canned booking wording.
complete: Med Tech contact open/create flow drafted
Canned booking message available in the patient workflow
Optional contact route explained for reception
Existing Med Tech contact detection confirmed during the controlled test
next: Confirm final wording for SMS/email booking prompts
Decide whether Med Tech creation happens automatically after referral review or only after staff confirmation

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.label: Cliniko history and NHS reporting workspace
stages.summary: Use the linked Cliniko patient and structured NHS case record to help Victoria see appointment history and pre-populate monthly reporting, DNA, discharge and activity fields.
complete: NHS required report fields identified
Discharge and DNA code sets captured
Stage 2 data fields added behind a collapsible NHS report section
Cliniko appointment fields identified as likely useful: date/time, appointment type, practitioner, patient_arrived, did_not_arrive, cancellation status and notes
next: Pull appointment history for matched Cliniko patients
Show previous appointments, attended/DNA/cancelled status and future bookings in the portal
Map Cliniko appointment data to Victoria's monthly NHS report fields
Build reporting views for referrals, DNAs, initial assessments, follow-ups, cancellations and discharge summaries
Confirm whether exact arrival timestamps are available in live Cliniko API data

buildLog: Dashboard API and frontend running locally for testing.
Cliniko and Med Tech credentials are stored locally as secrets and are not published.
Stage 1 live Cliniko sync has been validated with controlled dummy data.
The public demo remains anonymised and does not create live Cliniko or Med Tech records.
No patient-identifiable data is published on this progress website.
